title: carum korolkowii
intro: Carum korolkowii, also known as Chinese caraway or Chinese coriander, is a plant species belonging to the parsley family (Apiaceae). It is traditionally used in Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Carum korolkowii include reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and aiding in the treatment of respiratory problems, such as bronchitis. In herbal preparations, Carum korolkowii is often used in combination with other herbs, and is typically consumed as a tea, tincture, or capsule.
